feed.title: Ozel Yilmazel
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Ozel Yilmazel — CS graduate student at UMass Amherst, researcher at CIIR, interested in personalization, information retrieval, and ML.

entry.title: Hello, World
entry.content:
Welcome to my blog. I’ll be using this space to write about research, things I’m learning, and whatever else is on my mind.

More soon.
entry.summary: Welcome to my blog. I’ll be using this space to write about research, things I’m learning, and whatever else is on my mind.

entry.title: travel Time
entry.content: I will invite people to a party on Feb 24 on 2026, on Feb 24 2027 to check time travel.
entry.summary: I will invite people to a party on Feb 24 on 2026, on Feb 24 2027 to check time travel.
